sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 291 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.24. 2. For hearing of main case. 09.12.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the applicant. The impugned order is dated 08.03.2019 and it carries rubber stamp of the department denoting 10.03.2019, the present reference is presented on 05.08.2019. On 27.10.2020 following order was passed: “27.10.2020 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, adv for applicant. 1- To be complied with before the next date. 2- Granted subject to all just exceptions. 3- Learned counsel requests or time to assist this court as to whether instant Reference Application has been filed within the period of limitation or not. Time is granted. Adjourned.” Learned counsel submits that reference is time bared and no application has been filed seeking for condonation of delay. In view hereof, there appears no case to be entertained. Accordingly, this reference application is hereby dismissed as time barred. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
